## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run stylelint` pass
- [ ] `npm test` passes (new behaviour has tests; e2e updated if browser-only)
- [ ] `npm run size` stays within the size-limit budgets
- [ ] README / CHANGELOG updated if the public API or docs surface changed
